notes: Freight convoys (slice 4) — completes the player fleet. Station your freighters at a colony on logistics duty to haul its goods: it lowers that colony's market import fee and its base↔colony freight (bigger freighters save more). But a convoy in a pirate-active system risks ambush each cycle — your freighter takes damage and loses goods, and a fragile hauler can be sunk. Station a warship at the same colony to guard the convoys, cutting the ambush chance and the damage. Convoy losses are itemized in the Cycle accounts log. Build → mission → ally → haul: your navy and merchant marine are complete.
